name: the-lot-radio
title: The Lot Radio
description: Play/pause the audio stream of The Lot Radio
author: evnm

commands.name: play-pause
commands.title: Play or Pause the Lot Radio
commands.description: Toggle play/pause on The Lot Radio audio stream

commands.name: schedule
commands.title: View Today's Lineup
commands.description: See who's playing on The Lot Radio today

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
